Option B: Meridian District. A vibrant, high-energy area known for its world-class street food, colorful murals, and diverse cultural festivals. It has a fast-paced atmosphere with trendy boutiques and a highly diverse, eclectic population.

Option C: Oakwood. A standard suburban community with mid-century ranch homes, local shopping centers, and well-maintained public parks. It is a stable, family-oriented residential area.

which one should i go with for a brochure focused on "prestige and refinement"?
